steps.title: Use slope-intercept form
steps.content: A line with slope $-7$ has the form $$y=-7x+b.$$

steps.title: Use the y-intercept
steps.content: The line passes through $(0,54)$, so the $y$-intercept is $54$. Therefore $b=54$.

steps.title: Check the intercept directly
steps.content: A point with $x=0$ lies on the $y$-axis, so $(0,54)$ means the intercept is $54$. The choices all have slope $-7$, so the intercept is the deciding detail.
